summary: User wants to create an adult (porn) website.
known_issues: Requested project involves porn/adult content, which may be disallowed and block implementation guidance.

existing_features.title: Do not build a pornographic website or any functionality intended to distribute explicit sexual content. Instead, implement a safe, non-explicit, age-gated content platform suitable for mature audiences (e.g., educational or artistic content) with strict content rules.

Add an age-gate flow that blocks access until the user confirms they are 18+ (or the applicable age threshold) and persist the confirmation in the user session/device so returning users are not repeatedly prompted.

Implement basic content posting and browsing for non-explicit items: create, list, view details, and delete the user’s own posts. Posts should support title, description text, optional external link URL, and creation timestamp.
Require Internet Identity login to create or delete posts; allow anonymous users to browse only after passing the age gate.
Add client-side and server-side content policy checks to reject explicitly sexual content in titles/descriptions (keyword-based filter) and display a clear error message when rejected.
Define and apply a coherent, distinctive visual theme for the app (colors, typography, spacing, and components) suitable for a mature-audience platform; avoid blue/purple as the primary palette.
